heroSubtitle: Sindiika obubaka bungi, teekawo AI chatbots, ddukanya inbox y'ekibiina, kola campaigns z'essimu era automate byonna — tewali koodi yeetaagisa.
connectPlatforms: Kwataganya emikutu gy'oyagala mu dakiika ntono — tewali bwakikugu bwetaagisa.
speaker: Speaker
transcriptLine1: Hi, neetaaga obuyambi ku oda yange.
transcriptLine2: Hi! Oda #4821 eri mu kukkirizibwa — ejja kutuuka ssaawa 9 leero.
transcriptLine4: Kiwedde! Endagiriro ekyusiddwa. Nkusiindikira okukakasa ku WhatsApp kaakano.
aiFeature1Desc: Akola essimu 24/7 n'okukozesa amagezi g'omuwa — tewali muyambi muntu yeetaagisa.
aiFeature2Desc: Addamu mu ssekonda wansi wa 1.2, amangu okusinga omuntu yonna.
aiFeature3Desc: Buli ssimu ewandiikibwa era n'etekebwa mu CRM yo mu kaseera ako.
aiFeature4Desc: Agabanya ebibuuzo ebizibu eri abayambi abantu sso nga ebirala abikola mu ngeri eyeetongola.
tabCallDesc: Teekawo eddoboozi lya AI erikola essimu za WhatsApp obudde bwonna — okukakasa leads, okuddamu ebibuuzo, n'okutegeka enkiiko.
tabInboxDesc: Wa abayambi emirimu, ssaako obulambe, wandiika ebiwandiiko, sunsula era ddamu — byonna okuva mu inbox emu. Ekola ne WhatsApp API, QR, ne Telegram.
tabFlowDesc: Sika nodes, kwataganya amadaala, olyoke utandike chatbot flows mu dakiika ntono. Automate WhatsApp ne Telegram, ddukanya okwogera — tewali mukozi wa koodi yeetaagisa.
otherFeaturesSubtitle: Okuva ku kukwataganya WhatsApp okutuuka ku kuteekawo AI call agents — WapiKit kuwa buli kikozesa ky'oteetaaga.
feature1Desc: Kwataganya n'okukozesa QR sikaani, Meta Embed Login, oba API. Ewagira byombi WhatsApp QR Plugin ne Meta Business API.
feature2Desc: Zimba WhatsApp chatbots n'amaanyi n'okukozesa drag-and-drop builder. Kola ebikolwa, ddukanya okwogera — tewali koodi.
feature3Desc: Tonda templates ezikkiriziddwa Meta, sindiika campaigns eri ekitabo ky'ennamba kyo, era goberera buli bubaka.
feature4Desc: Teekawo AI voice agent akola essimu za WhatsApp 24/7. Zimba call flows, kebera logs, era lungamya enteekateeka yo.
feature5Desc: Kwataganya WapiKit n'ebikozesa ebirala n'okukozesa webhooks ne Meta REST API. Automate logic, kwataganya data, era goberera buli kikolwa.
feature6Desc: Ddukanya ekibiina kyo kyonna okuva mu inbox emu. Wa abayambi okwogera, goberera emirimu, ssaako chat widget ku mukutu gwo.
testimonialSubtitle: Ebiwedde okuva mu bibiina ebituufu — laba engeri WapiKit gye biyamba bizinensi okukula n'okusanyusa abakasitoma ku WhatsApp.
testimonial1Text: WhatsCRM kikyusizza nnyo engeri gye tuwuliziganya n'abakasitoma. Omuwendo gw'okuggulawo gwava ku 20% okudda ku 94%.
testimonial2Text: Chatbot builder wa maanyi nnyo. Twasobola okukola 80% ku bibuuzo by'abakasitoma mu wiiki esooka. ROI ebadde ya kitalo.
testimonial3Text: Okusindiika obubaka bungi ne Meta API kwangu nnyo. Twakola campaign eri abantu 50,000 mu dakiika ntono.
pricingSubtitle: Tandika kwa bwereere, kula nga bw'oyagala. Tewali nsimbi zikwekere, sazaamu ekiseera kyonna.
ctaSubtext: Gatta ku bizinensi 50,000+ ezikozesa WapiKit okukola WhatsApp marketing n'obuyambi.
faqSubtitle: Tosobola kuzuula ky'onoonya? Tuukirira abayambi baffe era tujja kukuddamu mu ssaawa ntono.
faqQ1: WapiKit kye ki era kikola gitya?
faqA1: WapiKit mukutu gwa WhatsApp CRM ne automation ogukwatagana ne WhatsApp Business API entuufu. Oyinza okuddukanya okwogera, okuzimba chatbot flows, okusindiika obubaka, n'okugoberera analytics — byonna okuva mu mmeeza emu.
faqQ2: Nneetaaga akawunti ya WhatsApp Business ekakasiddwa?
faqA2: Ku lwa Cloud API okukozesa ojja kwetaaga akawunti ya WhatsApp Business ekakasiddwa Meta. Ku lwa QR, ennamba yonna ya WhatsApp ekola — kirungi okutandika amangu nga tewali kukakasa.
faqA3: Yee! Okugezesa kwaffe okw'ennaku 14 kuwa ebintu ebikulu n'abantu okutuuka ku 100 — tewali kaadi ya bbanka yeetaagisa. Oyinza okulinnyisibwa ku nteekateeka ey'okusasula ekiseera kyonna.
faqQ4: Nyinza okusindiika obubaka eri abantu enkumi n'enkumi?
faqA4: Ddala. Bulk Broadcasting ekukkiriza okusindiika obubaka bwa template eri abantu enkumi n'enkumi omulundi gumu n'okukozesa Meta Cloud API.
faqA5: Visual flow builder akukkiriza okuzimba emikutu gy'okwogera n'obukwakkulizo, okulwa, n'okuddamu kwa AI — tewali koodi. Flows zitandika mu ngeri eyeetongola okusinziira ku bigambo oba ebikolwa.
faqQ6: Abayambi abangi bayinza okukozesa ennamba ya WhatsApp emu?
faqA6: Yee. Enteekateeka ezisingako ziwagira akawunti z'abayambi abangi, ekisobozesa ekibiina kyo kyonna okukolera ku inbox emu n'okugabanya emirimu.
faqA7: Data yenna asibiddwa (encrypted). Tugoberera enkola za Meta Business API n'obukuumi obw'omulembe okukuuma okwogera kwo ne data w'abantu bo nga mukuume.
adminWar: Ekitundu kino kiri ku lwa baddukanya abakkiriziddwa bokka.

recoveryDescription: Wandiika email ekwatagana ne akawunti yo eya admin era tujja kusindiika link y'okuzzaawo.

responseTime: Tuddamu mu ssaawa 24 mu nnaku z'omulimu.

catalogSendInfo: The 'View Catalog' button will be automatically included. Make sure your WhatsApp Business account has an active product catalog linked.
